_comment: Non-secret configuration options and pointers to files. Copy to workspace root as config.json. In-repo demo: see repo root config.json — omit content_systems_public when skills are local.

content_systems_public._comment: Your workspace only — omit when this repo IS content-systems. path is relative to workspace root.

google._comment: Pointers for Google client tooling — secrets live in credentials.json.
